story.description: A clip of rare natural phenomena, unusual light, ice, water, or seasonal events: scenic desert landscape with wildflowers
story.hook: Watch the storm; the payoff lands seconds later
story.lead: Rain hits the desert. See how the soil cracks open like a zipper—tiny seeds tumble into place. That's why the next day, pink and yellow explode everywhere. Just one good storm and the whole ground turns into a carpet of color. You ever seen a desert this alive?
